column8: Ron’s collection of coins was valuable as he (to collect) them since he was a schoolboy.
column9: When Sam returned home we (to watch) that TV programme for a quarter of an hour already.
column10: Bill’s coat and mittens were wet because he (to play) snowballs with his friends in the yard.
column11: David was irritated because the police inspector (to ask) him questions for more than an hour.
column12: She (to work) as a shop-assistant for ten years in this shop.
column13: Anthony (wait) for his airplane for 3 hours when its delay was announced.
column14: I (to have) breakfast before I went to school.
column15: He went to meet his friends after he (to do) his homework.
column17: Alice was late because she (to miss) the bus.
column18: She went to the post-office after she (to write) the letter.
column19: He (to work) at the factory before he entered the college.
